headline: HCA Healthcare Names Cynthia Cifuentes-Finkel Senior Vice President of Marketing and Corporate Affairs
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., April 27, 2026--HCA Healthcare (NYSE: HCA) today announced that Cynthia Cifuentes-Finkel has been named senior vice president of marketing and corporate affairs, effective June 8, 2026. She will report to Mike McAlevey, executive vice president, chief legal and administrative officer, and will lead enterprise marketing, corporate communications, and stakeholder engagement in support of HCA Healthcare’s enterprise growth priorities.

headline: How The Investment Story For HCA Healthcare (HCA) Is Shifting Around AI And Medicaid Assumptions
summary: HCA Healthcare’s modeled fair value has been trimmed from US$543.05 to US$535.00. This reflects an US$8 target cut that signals a slightly cooler stance in some updated research. That change comes as analysts split between raising and lowering price targets, weighing AI related efficiency potential, Medicaid related earnings support, and execution on guidance. Read on to see what is driving these shifting views and how you can track the evolving story around HCA’s valuation targets over...

headline: HCA Announces Proposed Public Offering of Senior Notes
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., April 27, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) today announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, HCA Inc., proposes to offer senior notes, subject to market and other considerations. Actual terms of the senior notes, including maturity, interest rate and principal amount, will depend on market conditions at the time of pricing. HCA Inc. intends to use the net proceeds from this offering for general corporate purposes, which may include the repayment of outstanding borrowings

raw.headline: HCA Announces Proposed Public Offering of Senior Notes
raw.summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., April 27, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) today announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, HCA Inc., proposes to offer senior notes, subject to market and other considerations. Actual terms of the senior notes, including maturity, interest rate and principal amount, will depend on market conditions at the time of pricing. HCA Inc. intends to use the net proceeds from this offering for general corporate purposes, which may include the repayment of outstanding borrowings

headline: ACA subsidy lapse cost HCA Healthcare $150M in Q1
summary: The hit was in line with HCA’s expectations. The hospital operator is the first of its peers to detail financial impacts from the expiration of more generous subsidies in Affordable Care Act plans.
